name: chosen/faq-accordion
title: FAQ Accordion
description: Collapsible Q&A list. Single-item-open behaviour. Vanilla JS, accessible (aria-expanded, keyboard nav).

default.question: What is Chosen?
default.answer: Chosen is a national Catholic youth conference run by Jesus Youth Australia. Four days of rallies, workshops, Mass, Adoration, live music and community, held at La Trobe University in Melbourne, 19–22 November 2026.

default.question: Who is it for?
default.answer: Anyone aged 16–35 — high schoolers, uni students, young professionals and young couples (married up to 5 years), including those with children. If you're somewhere on the journey of faith and open to more, it's for you.

default.question: Do I need to be a strong Catholic to come?
default.answer: Not at all. Chosen welcomes everyone — whether you're deep in your faith, somewhere in between, or just curious. There's no pressure. A lot of people who come say it was the thing that sparked something new in them.

default.question: Where is it held?
default.answer: La Trobe University, Bundoora Campus, Melbourne.

default.question: What's the format?
default.answer: It's a day conference — you travel in each morning and leave each evening. Accommodation is not included but is being explored as an optional extra. Details TBC.

default.question: How do I get to Melbourne?
default.answer: Travel is arranged independently. A lot of groups coordinate flights or road trips together — we'd encourage that.

default.question: Is childcare available?
default.answer: Yes, and it's included in your registration fee. Times and logistics are TBC.

default.question: Is it safe?
default.answer: Yes. All staff and volunteers hold a valid Working With Children Check. Jesus Youth Australia has a comprehensive Child Safety and Safeguarding Policy, and trained welfare officers and first aid staff are present throughout the event.

default.question: How much does it cost?
default.answer: Victoria — $330. NSW, ACT, QLD, SA — $290. WA, TAS, NT — $230. All meals and childcare are included.

default.question: Why are prices different by state?
default.answer: The further you're travelling, the more you're already spending to get here. The tiered pricing is our way of making sure distance isn't a reason to stay home.

default.question: Is there a group discount?
default.answer: Yes — groups of 10 or more from the same state get 10% off. Parish, school or a larger community? Get in touch at info@chosenconference.org.au before registering.

default.question: How does under-18 registration work?
default.answer: Under-18s must register through a group leader who registers on their behalf. Get in touch at info@chosenconference.org.au for more info.

default.question: Are payment plans available?
default.answer: Yes. We genuinely don't want cost to be the reason you couldn't have an encounter with Christ at Chosen. Reach out to info@chosenconference.org.au and we'll work something out.

default.question: What's the early registration raffle?
default.answer: Every week you're registered before November earns you a raffle ticket. The earlier you register, the more chances you have. Prizes include full rego covered, rego halved, and 50% off merch. Nine winners total.

default.question: Still have a question?
default.answer: Send it through to info@chosenconference.org.au and we'll get back to you.
